title: X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:X-wing-Prima.jpg]] |title=''X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide'' |author=[[Rusel DeMaria]] |cover artist=[[Martin Cameron]] |illustrator=*[[Marian Hartsough Associates]] {{C|Book Design and Layout}} *Rusel DeMaria {{C|Book Design and Layout}} *Ocean Quigley {{C|Special Image Processing and Interior Art}} *Martin Cameron {{C|3D Modeling}} *[[John Bell]] {{C|3D Modeling}} *[[The Dunlavey Studio]] {{C|Cover Adaptation}} |editor= *[[Roger Stewart]] {{C|Executive Editor}} *[[Neweleen Trebnik]] {{C|Managing Editor}} *[[Lindy Daily Paulson]] {{C|Project Editor}} *[[Matthew Briere Hansen]] {{C|Project Editor}} *[[Rick Barba]] {{C|Copyeditor}} *[[David Maxwell|Dave Maxwell]] {{C|Technical Editor}} *[[David Wessman|Dave Wessman]] {{C|Technical Editor}} *[[Ocean Quigley]] {{C|Technical Editor}} |publisher=[[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]] |release date=[[June 1]], [[1993]]{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/46|text=X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide}} |type=Paperback |pages=432 |dimensions=7.5 x 0.8 x 9.2 inches |weight=1.6 pounds |isbn=1559583754 |series=''Prima's Secrets of the Games'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide''''' is a computer game strategy book for [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] written by [[Rusel DeMaria]], [[David Wessman]], and [[David Maxwell]] and published by [[Prima Games]]. It contains much of the story from ''[[The Farlander Papers]]'' and continues the story of [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] throughout, along with walkthroughs and strategies designed to help players defeat the simulator missions, the missions for the game's first three Tours of Duty, and interviews with the game's creators and design team. A subsequent edition, ''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]'', reprinted the original material and added walkthroughs for the [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit|''Imperial Pursuit'']] and [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing|''B-Wing'']] expansion packs. ==Publisher's summary== Climb into the cockpit of a Rebel fighter craft and join Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, Chewbacca the Wookiee, and the newest Rebel hero, Keyan Farlander, as they fight the evil Emperor and his minions. Face danger a hundred times — then come back for more! Written by the author of ''The Farlander Papers'', this handbook continues the story of Keyan Farlander's adventures. These further adventures will take ''X-Wing'' players through every important detail, as well as each strategy and tactic needed to succeed at the increasingly hair-raising missions. ''X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide'' is the ultimate resource for fans of LucasArts' hit game. Included in this book are: *General tactics and strategies for flying each spacecraft and for each mission, elaborately illustrated with screenshots and 3-D images. *Winning strategies for each of the more than 50 missions and tours of duty devised by the game's designers and testers. *Revealing interviews with Larry Holland, Ed Kilham, and the ''X-Wing'' Design Team *More of the ''Farlander Papers'' - the limited edition, collectors' novella that was included in many of the game boxes *Detailed statistics for every mission ==Contents== *Part I: Farlander's Story *Part II: Early Training *Part III: Historical Combat Missions **X-Wing Historical Combat Missions **Y-Wing Historical Combat Missions **A-Wing Historical Combat Missions *Part IV: Tours of Duty **Tour of Duty #1 — A New Ally **Tour of Duty #2 — The Great Search **Tour of Duty #3 — The Gathering Storm *Appendices **Glossary **Index ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|1559583754}}; [[June]] [[1993]]; [[Prima Games|Prima Publishing]]; US paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:X-wing-Prima.jpg|Front cover File:X-wing-Prima-back_cover.jpg|Back cover ==Appearances== {{App |characters=
